member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.CornerUtilities
member.summary: Common functions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.CornerUtilities.GetRealCornerData(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerRecord,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the real corner data to be used to export. Possible outcomes are: corner's ActiveData (with valid value), a disabled value (-9.999) or the last item stored.
member.param: Indicate whether the Export procedure should check if the corner was disabled in one point for the current ActiveData flow.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions
member.summary: Class that holds the data to configure and build the export tokens.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.IncludeDisabledCornerAtExport
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to IncludeDisabledCornerAtExport.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.FrequencyPrintMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets the FrequencyPrintMultiplier.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.MaxFlowNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the MaxFlowNumber.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.AllFlowExpansion
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to AllFlowExpansion.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.AllowBypassCorners
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to AllowBypassCorners.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions.PrintOnlyPassingFlowAtFrequencyNameToken
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to print only the passing flow onwards data in the token with frequency names, leaving the lower failed flows with empty data, but with the flow separator.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ITokenBuilder
member.summary: Main interface for UPS token builders.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ITokenBuilder.AddDomain(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerRecord}},System.String)
member.summary: Add domain to process the data.
member.param: The corner record that includes all corners and voltages.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ITokenBuilder.GetTokenValue
member.summary: Gets the string token value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.StringTokenExport
member.summary: Provides the main UPS token export capability.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.StringTokenExport.#ctor(Prime.VminForwardingService.IVminForwardingService,System.String,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Key of the string table to export the passing flow token with the numerical frequency value.
Key of the string table to export the passing flow token with the frequency identifier value.
Struct that holds the includeDisabledCornerAtExport, frequencyPrintMultiplier and maxFlowNumber.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.StringTokenExport.ExportData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType)
member.summary: Exports the data to the shared storage with the UPS required format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.StringTokenExport.SetPassingFlows
member.summary: This method can be optimized with Parallel.ForEach and ConcurrentDictionary at high instance count.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants
member.summary: Constants to build the tokens.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.DomainSeparator
member.summary: DomainSeparator.

member.summary: FrequencyStartSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.FrequencyNameStartSeparator
member.summary: FrequencyNameStartSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.VoltageValuesStartSeparator
member.summary: VoltageValuesStartSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.FrequencySeparator
member.summary: FrequencySeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.VoltageSeparator
member.summary: VoltageSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.InstanceCornerSeparator
member.summary: InstanceCornerSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.FlowSeparator
member.summary: FlowSeparator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenBuilderConstants.DoubleValueVoltageFormat
member.summary: Format to print the voltage value format in the token.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyNameAllFlows
member.summary: Builds TokenFrequencyName for All Flows.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Passing flow for the domains and corners.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyNameAllFlows.GetPassingFlowsData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerRecord}},System.String)
member.summary: Gets the voltage data for all flows up to the passing flow.
member.returns: Structure containing all corned data filled until the passing flow (included).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyNamePassingFlow
member.summary: Builds TokenFrequencyName only for Passing Flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyNamePassingFlow.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyValue
member.summary: TokenFrequencyValue.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyValue.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.ExportFormatOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Export.TokenFrequencyValue.MergeResultsFromRepeatedFrequencies(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}},System.Int32)
member.summary: This function merge the results from frequencies with the same value. This applies when different corners in the same flow have the same frequency value. Example: Flow 2: F1 ..... F4 (3000), F5(3000), F6(3400). Having 17 instances (subdomains), for frequency=3000 we will have 34 voltage results, instead of the expected 17 as the other unique frequencies. This algorithm merges, by position and determining the required chunks considering the instanceCount, the positional values of the voltages and uses the Max value found.
member.param: Collection with the frequency value and a list of voltage results (with count = instanceCount).
Instance/subdomain count, equals to the expected result count in the token for each frequency.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.DataLogger
member.summary: Class for Snapshot and Export data debug handling.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.DataLogger.#ctor(Prime.VminForwardingService.IVminForwardingService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.DataLogger.PrintSnapshotDataToConsole(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerRecord}}},System.String)
member.summary: Prints Snapshot data to console.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.DataLogger.CreateVminForwardingServiceInstancesSet
member.summary: Creates an all instances collection with full instances names: IA45@F1, ...

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.IEnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Class for IEnumerable extension methods.

member.summary: Returns if the list is null or empty.
member.returns: True if the object is null or empty.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.IEnumerableExtensions.IsNullOrDifferentSizeOf``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns if the list is null or have different size.
member.returns: True if the object is null or have a different size to the specified at the parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.NumericExtensions
member.summary: Numeric types extensions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Helpers.NumericExtensions.Round(System.Double)
member.summary: Rounds a double value to fixed decimals.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions
member.summary: VminForwarding Export TM main interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions.CreateSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an snapshot of the current VminForwarding data of all corners in the VminForwarding Service's configuration file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions.GetSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a snapshot data, previously stored by CreateSnapshot method.
member.returns: Each domain as keys and a list of VminForwarding record data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions.GetCurrentForwardingData
member.summary: Gets the current VminForwarding data of all corners in the VminForwarding Service's configuration file.
member.returns: Each domain as keys and a list of VminForwarding record data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions.ProcessData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType)
member.summary: Applies the pre-export or processing logic before exporting the data.
member.param: Data collection as base. Usually a snapshot data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.IVminForwardingExportExtensions.ExportData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Exports the forwarding data.
member.param: If the corner should be exported as Disabled when was killed at least one time in the corner's history (even when recovered).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType
member.summary: Export extension methods return type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the data member.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.OperationMode
member.summary: Operation mode for the extension.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.OperationMode.Snapshot
member.summary: Saves a snapshot of VminForwarding data with the specified key.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.OperationMode.Export
member.summary: Execute the export of data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PreProcessMode
member.summary: Pre processing data modes or implementations.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PreProcessMode.None
member.summary: Empty preprocessing. The base data is used without changes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PreProcessMode.Interpolation
member.summary: Interpolator implementation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PreProcessMode.InterpolationWithForwardingUpdate
member.summary: Interpolator implementation, updating the values interpolated back to the forwarding corner data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.ExportType
member.summary: Export data output type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.ExportType.SharedStorageUPSTokens
member.summary: Shared storage UPS tokens: passing flow.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Boolean
member.summary: Enum for Boolean values.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Boolean.FALSE
member.summary: False / Disabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Boolean.TRUE
member.summary: True / Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.InstanceCornerSeparator
member.summary: Instance key/corner separator. i.e.: IA45@F5.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.DisabledCoreVoltage
member.summary: Disabled / kill core voltage value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.OperationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the TM operation mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.SnapshotKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the shared storage's key used to save the snapshot data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.FrequencyPrintMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets the multiplier to be applied to the frequency values printed into the export token with frequency values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.AllFlowExpansion
member.summary: Gets or sets if all flows values will be printed into the export token with frequency id.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.ExportDataLog
member.summary: Gets or sets if Search and Check data will be export as the interpolator results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.AllowBypassCorners
member.summary: Gets or sets if a bypass corner is allowed. If true print -9.999 if false will throw exception.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.PreProcessMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the data processing mode mechanism.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.ExportType
member.summary: Gets or sets the export type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.ExportKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets the export keys available to export the data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.MaxFlowNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum expected flow number to export data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.IncludeDisabledCornerAtExport
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Export procedure should check if the corner was disabled in one point. If True(1) and the corner was disabled at one point in the voltage history, the Disabled value is Exported instead.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.PrintOnlyPassingFlowAtFrequencyNameToken
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Export token for all flows with frequency name includes only the passing flow onwards data, leaving the lower failed flows with empty data, but with the flow separator.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.PreProcessInput
member.summary: Gets or sets the preprocess data (ie: interpolation objects string token) input.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.PrimeVminForwardingExportTestMethod.DataLogger
member.summary: Gets an instance to log vminforwarding table values into the console.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.DataProcessHandler
member.summary: Main data processing context class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.DataProcessHandler.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.IProcessor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.DataProcessHandler.SetStrategy(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.IProcessor)
member.summary: Sets the strategy to use with the data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.DataProcessHandler.GetProcessedData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType)
member.summary: Executes the main processing logic.
member.param: Data collection as base. Usually a snapshot data.
New data collection to compare to. Usually a snapshot with newer data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.EmptyProcessor
member.summary: Empty / null preprocessor. To avoid any changes prior to the Export step.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.EmptyProcessor.Prime#TestMethods#VminForwardingExport#Process#IProcessor#ProcessData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType)
member.summary: Returns the same baseData.
member.param: Data collection as base. Usually a snapshot data.
New data collection to compare to. Usually a snapshot with newer data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData
member.summary: Placeholder class for pivot data for interpolation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.#ctor(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerData,Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerData,Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerData,Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerData)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.PivotOneBaseData
member.summary: Gets the First pivot search data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.PivotOneNewData
member.summary: Gets the First pivot check data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.PivotTwoBaseData
member.summary: Gets the Second pivot search data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.PivotTwoNewData
member.summary: Gets the Second pivot check data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.IsAnyCornerDisabled
member.summary: Checks if any pivot corner has a disabled value as the voltage.
member.returns: True if one corner have a disabled value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationPivotData.AreAnyPivotFrequenciesDifferent
member.summary: Checks if the first or second pivot frequencies are different from the Base and New data.
member.returns: True if a frequency is different from base to new data on a pivot.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor
member.summary: Main Interpolator implementation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.pivotLocations
member.summary: Pivot applied locations: ["IA"]["F1"]= {F2}, ["IA"]["F3"]= {F2, F4}. For a O(1) search when processing.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.interpolatorMap
member.summary: Mapping locations: ["IA"]["F2"] = {F1, F3}.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.pivotOrder
member.summary: List with the order of pivots to check.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.#ctor(Prime.VminForwardingService.IVminForwardingService,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Struct that hold the data to configure the interpolator.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.GetRealCornerData(Prime.VminForwardingService.VminForwardingCornerRecord)
member.summary: If the corner last store operation was disabled (with a -9.999) the disabled value is returned. Otherwise the ActiveData (with valid value) is returned.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.SetupMappings(System.String,Prime.VminForwardingService.IVminForwardingConfigurationHandler)
member.summary: Builds the corner mapping objects with pivots and linked corners to update.
member.param: String token with mapping raw data. Ex: "IA:F2@F1-F3,F4@F3-F6,F5@F3-F6|CLM:...".

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.SetupPivotLocations
member.summary: Setups the pivot locations dictionary.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations
member.summary: struct that holds the data configure the interpolator.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations.CornerMapping
member.summary: CornerMapping. The corner mapping token. Example: IA:F2@F1-F3,F4@F3-F6,F5@F3-F6|IAX:...|SSE:...

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations.MaxFlow
member.summary: MaxFlow. Limit flow number.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations.UpdateForwardingValues
member.summary: UpdateForwardingValues. Sets whether the interpolated values should be updated at the forwarding consoleService current corner data.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.InterpolationProcessor.InterpolatorConfigurations.AllowBypassCorners
member.summary: AllowBypassCorners. If the interpolator should allow bypass corners.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.IProcessor
member.summary: Main interface for data processor implementations.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.Process.IProcessor.ProcessData(Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType,Prime.TestMethods.VminForwardingExport.VminForwardingExportDataType)
member.summary: Main method to pre-process the VminForwarding data, prior to export.
member.param: Data collection as base. Usually a snapshot data.
New data collection to compare to. Usually a snapshot with newer data.
member.returns: A list with processed values to export.
